settings.title: Stop Shipping CSS Nobody Sees
settings.excerpt: Most marketing sites load a stylesheet two or three times larger than the page actually uses.
settings.body:
When a site feels slow on a phone, the cause is rarely a single big image. More often it is a pile of styles and scripts loaded on every page whether they are needed or not.

Here is the habit we follow on every Codebase build.

  • Split CSS so each page loads only the components it renders.
  • Defer scripts that are not needed for the first paint.
  • Measure on a real mid range Android, not a top end laptop.

The result is usually a page that feels instant, even on a tired connection.
